title: Writing to a file — open, write, close
session_name: Python Foundations II and Calling an LLM

course.title: Python for AI, PE, VC and RAG

artifact_plan.diagram_intent: Side-by-side contrast: write mode ('w') erases file then writes from beginning; append mode ('a') adds to end. Both show open → write → auto-close lifecycle.
profile_signals: write vs append branch creates natural contrast
implementation section warranted for lab connection
7 core concept subsections fit standard depth
soft_findings_carry_forward: §5.5 list comprehension — reading builder replace with plain for-loop appending \n to new list
§6 Implementation — reading builder use parallel lists (names/scores) instead of list-of-tuples; no tuple syntax
§6.2 repr() debug step — reading builder remove entirely
§6.3 docstring — reading builder keep with one-line explanation or drop
